title: Quotes that remind you of Evangelion
display_title: Quotes that remind you of Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Quotes that remind you of Evangelion             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Wed Feb 06, 2013 7:17 pm Ever have a moment where you're watching a movie, show, anime, video game, etc., where you see a particular scene or hear a quote (being the Eva fan that you are) suddenly think "Wow, this reminds me of Evangelion somehow", whether it reminds you of the characters, the events, or the lessons? Well, just like "Songs that remind you of Evangelion" thread, what quotes do you know that subconsciously bring you back to Evangelion? Here's a couple for my own: "The Gods will not do for us what we can do for ourselves." -Hrothgar, Beowulf As I stated in a previous thread , this reminds me of Evangelion in the lesson that we don't need to retreat to a fantasy to live our life when its possible to face life on your own with hard work and dedication. "I can't believe you got him! You expert rooting-tooting, eagle-eyed, goth loving marksman! I love it. You managed to find a way to win. And everybody still loses!" -The Joker, Batman and the Red Hood Considering the Rebuild hype that's going on in this forum, I think this one is pretty self-explanatory.

[]:             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Wed Feb 06, 2013 10:08 pm It's not really a quote, but I read The Aeneid recently and the battle with the Harpies finally made me realize where the MPE's nickname came from.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Feb 06, 2013 11:03 pm 3.0  SPOILER: Show
